   "id": "c7917db6",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Eigenmode under uncertainty (spline & RF gun)\n",
    "\n",
    "> **Uncertainty quantification plugs into every analysis.** In cavsim2d, a run is deterministic — one geometry, one answer — until you add a `uq_config`. With it, the analysis is evaluated over a small Stroud-3 quadrature of the uncertain geometry and returns a **distribution** (mean and standard deviation) instead of a single number. The *same* pattern works for eigenmode, tuning (robust tuning), wakefield, and optimisation (robust optimisation) — only multipacting does not yet take a `uq_config`.\n",
    "\n",
    "These advanced examples deliberately span several cavity types (spline, RF gun, flat-top, elliptical, pillbox) — a good stress test of the model-agnostic machinery.\n",
    "\n",
    "Here we propagate a geometry tolerance through the **eigenmode** solve for two non-elliptical cavities."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "a207c0e3",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-18T09:32:14.780834Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-18T09:32:14.780686Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-18T09:32:16.730681Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-18T09:32:16.729804Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import os\n",
    "import tempfile\n",
    "\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "from cavsim2d import Cavities, SplineCavity, RFGun\n",
    "from cavsim2d.utils.style import apply_style\n",
    "\n",
    "apply_style()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "0f18a3b2",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 1. A spline cavity — uncertainty on a control point\n",
    "\n",
    "A `SplineCavity` is parameterised by Bézier control points, so its uncertain variables are point *coordinates* (here the radius of `p3`, the equator control point). A 2% spread on it moves the frequency and R/Q."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "9063ff4c",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-18T09:32:16.733279Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-18T09:32:16.732961Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-18T09:32:23.458055Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-18T09:32:23.457292Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<div>\n",
       "<style scoped>\n",
       "    .dataframe tbody tr th:only-of-type {\n",
       "        vertical-align: middle;\n",
       "    }\n",
       "\n",
       "    .dataframe tbody tr th {\n",
       "        vertical-align: top;\n",
       "    }\n",
       "\n",
       "    .dataframe thead th {\n",
       "        text-align: right;\n",
       "    }\n",
       "</style>\n",
       "<table border=\"1\" class=\"dataframe\">\n",
       "  <thead>\n",
       "    <tr style=\"text-align: right;\">\n",
       "      <th></th>\n",
       "      <th>mean</th>\n",
       "      <th>std</th>\n",
       "    </tr>\n",
       "  </thead>\n",
       "  <tbody>\n",
       "    <tr>\n",
       "      <th>freq [MHz]</th>\n",
       "      <td>1534.0516</td>\n",
       "      <td>0.0578</td>\n",
       "    </tr>\n",
       "    <tr>\n",
       "      <th>R/Q [Ohm]</th>\n",
       "      <td>103.4231</td>\n",
       "      <td>0.0006</td>\n",
       "    </tr>\n",
       "  </tbody>\n",
       "</table>\n",
       "</div>"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "                 mean     std\n",
       "freq [MHz]  1534.0516  0.0578\n",
       "R/Q [Ohm]    103.4231  0.0006"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 2,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "geom = {'p0': [0, 35], 'p1': [0, 70], 'p2': [30, 103],\n",
    "        'p3': [85, 103], 'p4': [115, 70], 'p5': [115, 35]}\n",
    "cavs = Cavities(os.path.join(tempfile.mkdtemp(), 'spline_uq'))\n",
    "cavs.add_cavity([SplineCavity({'geometry': dict(geom)}, kind='Bezier')], ['SPLINE'])\n",
    "\n",
    "cavs.run_eigenmode({\n",
    "    'processes': 1, 'rerun': True, 'boundary_conditions': 'mm',\n",
    "    'uq_config': {\n",
    "        'variables': ['p3_r'],\n",
    "        'objectives': ['monopole:freq [MHz]', 'monopole:R/Q [Ohm]'],\n",
    "        'method': ['stroud3'], 'delta': [0.02], 'processes': 1,\n",
    "    },\n",
    "})\n",
    "res = cavs.uq_fm_results['SPLINE']\n",
    "pd.DataFrame({q.split(':', 1)[-1]: {'mean': v['expe'][0], 'std': v['stdDev'][0]}\n",
    "             for q, v in res.items()}).T.round(4)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "83ce94ff",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 2. An RF gun — uncertainty on a wall radius\n",
    "\n",
    "The exact same call, a different model: a 2% spread on the gun's `R6` wall radius. Nothing about the UQ setup is elliptical-specific."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "d402940c",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-18T09:32:23.461050Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-18T09:32:23.460854Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-18T09:32:34.719892Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-18T09:32:34.718963Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<div>\n",
       "<style scoped>\n",
       "    .dataframe tbody tr th:only-of-type {\n",
       "        vertical-align: middle;\n",
       "    }\n",
       "\n",
       "    .dataframe tbody tr th {\n",
       "        vertical-align: top;\n",
       "    }\n",
       "\n",
       "    .dataframe thead th {\n",
       "        text-align: right;\n",
       "    }\n",
       "</style>\n",
       "<table border=\"1\" class=\"dataframe\">\n",
       "  <thead>\n",
       "    <tr style=\"text-align: right;\">\n",
       "      <th></th>\n",
       "      <th>mean</th>\n",
       "      <th>std</th>\n",
       "    </tr>\n",
       "  </thead>\n",
       "  <tbody>\n",
       "    <tr>\n",
       "      <th>freq [MHz]</th>\n",
       "      <td>212.6273</td>\n",
       "      <td>0.2061</td>\n",
       "    </tr>\n",
       "    <tr>\n",
       "      <th>R/Q [Ohm]</th>\n",
       "      <td>132.7171</td>\n",
       "      <td>14.4280</td>\n",
       "    </tr>\n",
       "  </tbody>\n",
       "</table>\n",
       "</div>"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "                mean      std\n",
       "freq [MHz]  212.6273   0.2061\n",
       "R/Q [Ohm]   132.7171  14.4280"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 3,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "gun = {'geometry': {'y1': 1.5e-2, 'R2': 3e-2, 'T2': np.deg2rad(45), 'L3': 24e-2,\n",
    "                    'R4': 5e-2, 'L5': 11e-2, 'R6': 6e-2, 'L7': 19e-2, 'R8': 4e-2,\n",
    "                    'T9': np.deg2rad(8), 'R10': 3e-2, 'T10': np.deg2rad(40),\n",
    "                    'L11': 5e-2, 'R12': 3e-2, 'L13': 3e-2, 'R14': 3e-2, 'x': 1e-2}}\n",
    "cavs_g = Cavities(os.path.join(tempfile.mkdtemp(), 'gun_uq'))\n",
    "cavs_g.add_cavity([RFGun(gun)], ['GUN'])\n",
    "\n",
    "cavs_g.run_eigenmode({\n",
    "    'processes': 1, 'rerun': True, 'boundary_conditions': 'mm',\n",
    "    'uq_config': {\n",
    "        'variables': ['R6'],\n",
    "        'objectives': ['monopole:freq [MHz]', 'monopole:R/Q [Ohm]'],\n",
    "        'method': ['stroud3'], 'delta': [0.02], 'processes': 1,\n",
    "    },\n",
    "})\n",
    "res_g = cavs_g.uq_fm_results['GUN']\n",
    "pd.DataFrame({q.split(':', 1)[-1]: {'mean': v['expe'][0], 'std': v['stdDev'][0]}\n",
    "             for q, v in res_g.items()}).T.round(4)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "c094314f",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 3. The spread, at a glance\n",
    "\n",
    "`plot_compare_fm_scatter(uq=True)` shows each figure of merit as a mean with a $\\pm1\\sigma$ error bar and the nominal design point — the built-in UQ comparison plot."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "8714e8e4",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-18T09:32:34.722791Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-18T09:32:34.722586Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-18T09:32:35.185573Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-18T09:32:35.184734Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 600x300 with 2 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cavs.plot_compare_fm_scatter(uq=True, qois=['freq', 'R/Q'])\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
